description: Meta rules for applying AI agent rules covering file size limits and line count restrictions, scope management and complexity control, error handling patterns, rule application guidelines, code quality standards, validation requirements, change management strategies for maintainable codebases, planning mode behavior for plan file generation, and mode-aware test-first enforcement spanning BDD (outer loop) and TDD (inner loop) under a shared test-run gate

files.description: Meta rules for rule application and code quality
